title: ImproFine
description: Featureful and performant fabric-based minecraft modpack
body:
# ⚡ ImproFine
![ImproFine Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/630407b3fc4180b212f7e89dc9623da18b1978fa.png)
[![Modrinth Link](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/2dc967fc44dc73850eee42c133a55c8ffc5e30cb/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/improfine)
[![CurseForge Link](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/2dc967fc44dc73850eee42c133a55c8ffc5e30cb/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/improfine)
![Available For Fabric](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/2dc967fc44dc73850eee42c133a55c8ffc5e30cb/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_vector.svg)

Improfine is a featureful and performant fabric-based minecraft modpack. This pack was a private modpack before that i and my friend used for a while. The focus of this modpack is to be powerful while easy to use

## 📦 Features

Some of the mods that this modpack are:
- Significant performance improvement (up to 3x vanilla)
- Shaders Support
- OptiFine compat: Zoom, Dynamic light, Connected textures, OptiFine resourcepack features.
- Easy inventory manipulation: shift clicking and sorting,
- Improved HUD: better recipe book, improved tooltip, colored f3,
- Waypoint system
- and many more!

## ⚙️ Setup
[You can follow the official modrinth setup guide here.](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth)

- I recommend using [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app) or [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/)

## 📌 Disclaimer
While most of features on this mods are configured for fair-play, some public servers might not tolerate the usage of some features in this modpack. You should check the server's rules before using it on a public server. I am not responsible for the consequences of inappropriate use of this modpack.

## ✌️ Credits

- [Fabulously Optimized](https://download.fo) - a big inspirations for this modpack
